About.title: About Konstantin
About.lead: Riga-based camera operator and montage editor across broadcast, live music, comedy, and branded content — usually with a passport stamp in the bag.
About.body1: Konstantin picked up the craft on cramped student TV sets, then moved into concerts, multicam stages, and handheld documentary work. The same instinct for rhythm and story later carried into the suite — assembly, pacing, and cuts that still feel like one hand on the camera.
About.body2: Recent seasons mix ENG field days with edit-room blocks: long lenses and roaming coverage on stage, then timeline passes on concert films, TV blocks, and festival packages — plus the usual exposure wrangling between LED walls and tungsten practicals.
About.body3: Based in Latvia, comfortable across the Baltics and Poland — Warsaw, Vilnius, Tallinn, and Jūrmala are all regular pins on the map. English, Latvian, and Russian on set; coffee preference is negotiable.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: The fastest way to reach me is through social channels — we can align on timing and details there.
